blended.narrative: Winter Park is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,299 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
